description.en: Cyc pursued an audacious symbolic-AI premise: common sense can be represented explicitly as a large ontology and rule base. Its knowledge engineers encoded concepts, relations, microtheories, and inference rules so software could reason beyond narrow expert-system domains.
description.zh: Cyc 追求一个大胆的符号 AI 设想：常识可以被显式表示为大规模本体与规则库。其知识工程师编码概念、关系、微理论和推理规则，使软件能够超越狭窄专家系统领域进行推理。

html.en: Expert systems worked in narrow domains but broke easily when ordinary background knowledge was missing.
html.zh: 专家系统能在狭窄领域工作，但缺少日常背景知识时很容易崩溃。

html.en: Cyc organizes facts and rules into an ontology with contextual microtheories, then uses inference to answer questions across that structure.
html.zh: Cyc 把事实与规则组织为带上下文微理论的本体，并用推理在该结构上回答问题。

html.en: Experts generally treat Cyc as one of the most ambitious symbolic-AI attempts to encode common sense explicitly. Its long-term legacy is keeping debates alive about knowledge engineering, hybrid reasoning, ontologies, and the limits of data-only learning.
html.zh: 专家通常把 Cyc 视为最雄心勃勃的符号 AI 尝试之一，目标是显式编码常识。它的长期影响在于持续推动关于知识工程、混合推理、本体和纯数据学习局限性的讨论。

method.zh: 大型符号本体与微理论

material.en: Cyc project publications and Cycorp materials
material.zh: Cyc 项目出版物与 Cycorp 材料

demo.zh: 沿微理论追踪常识推理

text.en: Concepts and relations are encoded explicitly.
text.zh: 概念与关系被显式编码。
上下文特定假设让推理保持有序。

text.en: Background knowledge is treated as a first-class AI resource.
text.zh: 背景知识被视为一等 AI 资源。

description.en: Foundational book record for Cyc and its large common-sense knowledge engineering program.
description.zh: Cyc 及其大型常识知识工程项目的奠基著作记录。

license.en: Reference link only; verify source rights before reuse.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；复用前需核验来源权利。
